---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include screenshots if applicable).

## Environment
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121]
- **Device**: [e.g., Desktop PC, iPad Air, iPhone 13]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, iOS 17]
- **Screen Resolution**: [e.g., 1920x1080, 768x1024]

## Console Errors
If there are any JavaScript errors in the browser console, please paste them here:

```
Paste console errors here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., what you were doing when the bug occurred, frequency of occurrence).

## Possible Solution (Optional)
If you have ideas on how to fix the bug, please describe them here.
